_comment: Damages calculator configuration. Update dollar amounts as new information becomes available. All amounts in USD.
caseCaption: Lane v. Florida Medical Clinic / Dr. Kayani & BayCare Neurology / Dr. Rosario

pastLostWages.label: Past Lost Wages & Use-or-Lose Annual Leave (2024–2025)
pastLostWages.description: Documented lost wages and forfeited annual leave during extended medical leave periods following both rhabdomyolysis episodes.
pastLostWages.notes: Includes extended medical leave 2024 and 2025, forfeited annual leave due to RIF and medical absences.

futureReducedEarningCapacity.label: Future Reduced Earning Capacity
futureReducedEarningCapacity.description: Permanent partial diminution in earning capacity and promotion potential due to chronic fatigue, exercise intolerance, and metabolic instability requiring accommodations.
futureReducedEarningCapacity.notes: 31-year federal career projected. Reduced ability to pursue promotions, higher-grade positions, or non-desk work.

fersDelta.label: FERS Retirement Delta (Early Disability vs. Full Retirement)
fersDelta.description: Increased probability of earlier FERS disability retirement vs. working to full retirement age (62). Delta between disability annuity and full retirement annuity × years of reduced service.
fersDelta.notes: Based on 31-year federal service. FERS disability annuity is ~60% of high-3 in first year, 40% thereafter. Full retirement would have been significantly higher.

futureMedicalExpenses.label: Future Medical Expenses
futureMedicalExpenses.description: Ongoing monitoring (CK, metabolic panels), supplements, genetic testing (Mayo Clinic), potential reduced work schedule, specialist visits.
futureMedicalExpenses.notes: Includes regular CK monitoring every 3-6 months, mitochondrial supplements, Mayo Clinic ongoing care, neurology follow-ups.

pastMedicalExpenses.label: Past Medical Expenses (Out-of-Pocket)
pastMedicalExpenses.description: Out-of-pocket medical costs not covered by FEP Blue for rhabdo hospitalizations, specialist visits, genetic testing.
pastMedicalExpenses.notes: Invitae panel ~$4,000 without insurance. ER copays, specialist copays.

physicalPainAndSuffering.label: Physical Pain & Suffering
physicalPainAndSuffering.description: Permanent muscle and cellular injury, chronic weakness, exercise intolerance, chronic pain since Aug 2025.
physicalPainAndSuffering.notes: Near-fatal twice. Ongoing daily pain rated 9/10 at times.

mentalEmotionalDistress.label: Severe Emotional Distress
mentalEmotionalDistress.description: Documented severe mental stress from job termination, permanent disability diagnosis, financial uncertainty.
mentalEmotionalDistress.notes: Confirmed by Kinsler Psychology (Oct 20, 2025). Medications adjusted.

lossOfEnjoymentOfLife.label: Loss of Enjoyment of Life
lossOfEnjoymentOfLife.description: Unable to exercise, physically impaired, permanently reduced functional capacity at age 44.
lossOfEnjoymentOfLife.notes: Exercise intolerance is permanent. Previously active federal employee.

lossOfConsortium.label: Loss of Consortium
lossOfConsortium.description: Impact on marital relationship due to permanent disability, chronic pain, emotional distress.
lossOfConsortium.notes: Wife present as witness at 9/2/2025 follow-up — aware of ongoing impact.
